tasks.name: Register for the earliest weekday evening food pantry volunteer shift within 5 miles of ZIP 30301 next month
tasks.description: Find a food pantry volunteer opportunity scheduled on a weekday evening within the next calendar month, located within 5 miles of ZIP code 30301, and complete registration for the earliest available shift.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled 'Serve' and then select 'Volunteer Opportunities' from the dropdown.
In the filters section, open the 'Category' dropdown and select 'Food pantry'.
Locate the 'Location' filter, enter ZIP code '30301' into the ZIP field, and set the radius to '5 miles'.
Open the 'Date range' picker, select the first day of next month as the start date and the last day of next month as the end date.
Find the 'Time of day' filter and check the option 'Evening (after 5:00 PM)'.
In the 'Days of week' filter, select Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday, and deselect Saturday and Sunday if they are checked.
Click the 'Sort by' dropdown and choose 'Date - Soonest first' from the list of sorting options.
From the filtered and sorted results, click on the first opportunity in the list to open its detail page.

On the opportunity detail page, click the button labeled 'Register for this shift' for the earliest listed date and time, then in the registration form enter full name 'Alex Rivera', email 'alex@example.com', phone '555-0101', and click the 'Submit' button.

tasks.name: Sign up for a free in-person financial coaching workshop at the Downtown Campus on a Saturday morning this month
tasks.description: Locate a free, in-person financial coaching workshop happening at the Downtown Campus on a Saturday morning within the current month, and complete a single-person registration for that event.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation link labeled 'Events'.
On the events page, open the 'Category' filter and select 'Workshops & Classes'.
Find the 'Cost' filter and choose the option 'Free only'.
In the 'Format' filter, select 'In-person', then use the 'Location' or 'Campus' dropdown to choose 'Downtown Campus'.

Open the 'Date range' picker and set the start date to the first day of the current month and the end date to the last day of the current month; then in the day-of-week options select 'Saturday' and in the time-of-day options select 'Morning (before 12:00 PM)'.
Click the 'Sort by' dropdown and select 'Date - Soonest first', then in the results list click on the first event whose title contains the word 'Financial'.
On the event detail page, click the 'Register' button.
In the registration form, enter first name 'Jordan', last name 'Lee', email 'jordan@example.com', set the number of attendees field to '1', and click the 'Complete registration' button.

tasks.name: Make a one-time $40 donation split as $25 to Youth Outreach and $15 to Local Food Pantry
tasks.description: Use the giving form to create a one-time donation totaling exactly $40, allocating $25 to the 'Youth Outreach' fund and $15 to the 'Local Food Pantry' fund, and submit the payment details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage and click on the main navigation link labeled 'Give'.
On the giving page, select the option 'One-time gift' from the frequency choices.
In the giving form, choose the mode that allows multiple funds, such as 'Custom allocation' or 'Split by fund'.
In the first fund row, open the fund dropdown, select 'Youth Outreach', and type '25' into the amount field.
Click the button to add another fund row, then in that row select 'Local Food Pantry' from the fund dropdown and type '15' into the amount field.
Scroll to the 'Payment method' section and select 'Credit/Debit card' as the payment option.
In the donor information fields, enter first name 'Taylor', last name 'Morgan', email 'taylor@example.com', and address line '123 Main Street'.
In the card number field, type '4111111111111111', in the expiration date field enter '12/28', and in the CVV field enter '123'.
If there is a ZIP or postal code field for the card, type '30301' into it.
Click the button labeled 'Submit donation' or 'Give now' to complete the donation.

tasks.name: Create a 3-event evening outreach plan across 3 different campuses within the next 60 days
tasks.description: Within the outreach events, select three evening events happening within the next 60 days, ensuring each event is at a different campus, add all three to 'My outreach plan', and then open the plan.
steps: From the homepage, click on 'Events' in the main navigation and then select 'Outreach & Service' from any available event-type filters.
On the outreach events page, open the date range picker and set the start date to today's date and the end date to 60 days from today (or select a preset labeled 'Next 60 days' if available).
In the 'Time of day' filter, select the option 'Evening (after 6:00 PM)'.
In the 'Campus' filter, choose 'All campuses' to include events from every campus.
Click the 'Sort by' dropdown and select 'Date - Soonest first'.
From the sorted results list, click on the first event, note the campus name displayed on its detail page, and then click the button labeled 'Add to my outreach plan'.

Use the 'Back to results' link or the browser's back button to return to the event list, scroll if needed, and click on the next event whose campus label is different from the first event's campus, then click 'Add to my outreach plan' on its detail page.

Return again to the results list, scroll further if needed, and select a third event whose campus label is different from the first two campuses, then click 'Add to my outreach plan' on that event's detail page.
After adding three events, click on the 'My outreach plan' link or icon in the header or sidebar to open the page that shows your saved outreach plan.

tasks.name: Request information from a Wednesday food pantry offering fresh produce and open after 3:00 PM
tasks.description: Find a food pantry resource that is open on Wednesdays after 3:00 PM and offers fresh produce, then use its phone number in a contact form to request more information about that specific location.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled 'Get Help' and select 'Food Resources' from the submenu.
On the food resources page, use the 'Category' filter to select 'Food pantry'.
Open the 'Day open' filter and check the option for 'Wednesday'.
Find the 'Hours' or 'Time of day' filter and choose the option 'Afternoon (after 3:00 PM)'.
In the 'Services offered' or 'Tags' filter, check the box labeled 'Fresh produce'.
From the filtered list of pantries, click on the first listing to open its detail page.
On the detail page, use the mouse to highlight the phone number, then press Ctrl+C (or Command+C on Mac) to copy the phone number to the clipboard.
Use the main navigation or footer links to go to the 'Contact us' page.

On the contact form, select 'Question about food pantry' from the subject dropdown, paste the copied phone number into the message box and add the text 'Please send me more information about this location.', then fill in the name field with 'Casey' and the email field with 'casey@example.com', and click the 'Send message' button.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the weekly email devotional for ages 18–35 with topics 'Community service' and 'Spiritual growth'
tasks.description: Sign up for a weekly email devotional targeted to the 18–35 age group, selecting only the 'Community service' and 'Spiritual growth' topics, and submit the subscription form.
steps: From any page on the site, scroll to the footer and click the link labeled 'Stay connected' or 'Email devotionals'.
On the devotional sign-up page, open the 'Email frequency' dropdown and select 'Weekly'.
In the 'Age group' dropdown, choose the option labeled '18–35'.
Under the 'Topics' section, check the boxes for 'Community service' and 'Spiritual growth' and leave any other topic checkboxes unselected.
In the name field, type 'Riley'.
In the email field, type 'riley@example.com'.
If there is an option labeled 'Text-only emails' or similar, check its checkbox to select that preference.
Click the 'Sign up' or 'Subscribe' button to submit the devotional subscription form.

tasks.name: Submit a private family-related prayer request scheduled for the upcoming Sunday
tasks.description: Use the prayer request form to submit a request about family and relationships, set it to be visible only to the pastoral team, and schedule it for the next upcoming Sunday.
steps: Navigate to the homepage and click on the main navigation link labeled 'Care & Prayer', then select 'Submit a prayer request'.
On the prayer request page, open the 'Category' dropdown and select 'Family & Relationships'.
In the privacy options, choose the setting labeled 'Share with pastoral team only' or similar.
Click on the date picker labeled 'Prayer focus date', navigate to the next upcoming Sunday on the calendar (the first Sunday that is later than today), and click that date.
In the message text area, type 'Please pray for reconciliation and wisdom in my family relationships.'.
In the name field, type 'Morgan'.
In the email field, enter 'morgan@example.com'.
Click the button labeled 'Submit prayer request' to send the request.

tasks.name: RSVP for the earliest neighborhood cleanup next month on a Saturday morning within 10 miles of ZIP 44101 and bring 2 guests
tasks.description: Find a neighborhood cleanup event scheduled for a Saturday morning in the next calendar month within 10 miles of ZIP code 44101, with a light activity level, and complete an RSVP indicating you will bring 2 guests.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled 'Serve' and choose 'Neighborhood cleanups' from the dropdown.
On the neighborhood cleanups page, locate the 'Location' filter, enter ZIP code '44101' into the ZIP field, and set the radius slider or dropdown to '10 miles'.
Open the 'Date range' picker and set the start and end dates to cover the entire next calendar month.
In the 'Day of week' filter, select 'Saturday', and in the 'Time of day' filter, choose 'Morning (before 12:00 PM)'.
Find the 'Activity level' filter and select 'Light activity'.
Click the 'Sort by' dropdown and select 'Date - Soonest first'.
From the filtered results, click on the first cleanup event in the list to open its detail page.
On the event detail page, click the button labeled 'RSVP'.
In the RSVP form, set the number of guests field to '2', then enter the name 'Jamie Carter', email 'jamie@example.com', and phone number '555-0202' into the respective fields.
Click the 'Confirm RSVP' or 'Submit RSVP' button to finalize your registration for the cleanup event.
